name: wx-video-account-notes
description: Download WeChat Channels videos and assemble OCR/ASR note materials.

interface.shortDescription: Process WeChat Channels share links into OCR/ASR note materials.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin for resolving WeChat Channels share links, downloading the source video, extracting OCR and ASR materials, and preparing structured note inputs.
defaultPrompt: 处理这个视频号链接并生成笔记：https://weixin.qq.com/sph/...
下载这个视频号链接并输出 OCR 与 ASR 材料：https://weixin.qq.com/sph/...
把这个视频号链接整理到指定目录：https://weixin.qq.com/sph/...
